description: imperative query building instead of composable scope chain
input:
def published_posts_by_author(author_id)
  sql = "SELECT * FROM posts WHERE"
  sql += " author_id = #{author_id}"
  sql += " AND published = true"
  sql += " ORDER BY created_at DESC"
  sql += " LIMIT 10"
  Post.find_by_sql(sql)
end
